overall.description: Third-person exploration gameplay from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing the exterior and interior of Erymanthos House at night. The clip features a coastal overlook with a ceremonial brazier, ancient Greek architecture with red stone walls, and garden paths, transitioning from outdoor moonlit environments to warm artificially lit interiors.

events.description: large ceremonial brazier with flames enters view from the left

agents.ego_description: panning left across the coastal overlook to reveal the burning brazier and distant island

entered.detail: dark blue sea stretching to the horizon under night sky
large mountain island silhouetted against cloudy sky
stone platform edge in the foreground
large bronze bowl with bright flames

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide coastal overlook at night, with the camera panning left across dark ocean waters toward a distant mountain island. A large stone terrace edge is visible in the foreground, and a ceremonial brazier with bright flames enters the frame from the left, illuminating the immediate area.

events.description: NPC holding a lit torch appears near the brazier

agents.ego_description: moving around the brazier and approaching the house exterior terrace

notable_agents.action: holding a torch near the large brazier, tending to the flames

entered.detail: two-story building with red plaster walls and stone foundation
low stone wall along the overlook edge
support columns for the house entrance canopy

segments.scene_description: The camera moves around the terrace, revealing the Erymanthos House with its distinctive red walls and stone foundation. An NPC holding a torch stands near the brazier. The ocean view exits the frame as the camera turns toward the building architecture.

events.description: approaching the warmly lit doorway of the house

agents.ego_description: walking around the building exterior toward the entrance doorway

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with torch toward the house entrance

entered.detail: tall olive trees with silvery green leaves
stone-framed entrance with wooden door and steps

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the house exterior along a cobblestone path lined with olive trees. The NPC with the torch walks ahead toward the entrance. The house facade moves from left to right in the frame as the camera approaches the warmly lit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek house interior with bedrooms

events.description: entering the house from the exterior terrace
interior illuminated by warm oil lamps and candles

agents.ego_description: exploring the interior rooms, examining bedroom furniture and decorative elements

entered.detail: doorway leading to inner rooms of the house
tall bronze stand with multiple lit oil lamps
decorative wooden screen with geometric patterns
multiple sleeping beds with white linens and red blankets
large ceramic urns and amphorae for storage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the house through the doorway, transitioning from cool moonlight to warm interior lighting from oil lamps. The space features bedroom areas with multiple beds, patterned rugs, and decorative wooden screens. Large storage vases and furniture fill the rooms as the camera explores the interior layout.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden courtyard with stone paths and trellises

events.description: exiting the house back to the exterior garden
encountering an armored character in the garden path

agents.ego_description: exiting the house and exploring the garden paths and courtyard area

notable_agents.action: armored figure standing in the garden path, then walking away

entered.detail: cobblestone pathway winding through planted garden
arched wooden trellis covered with climbing vines
large natural rock formation with small building on top

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the house into a moonlit garden courtyard with cobblestone paths and stone planters. An armored character stands in the path ahead before moving away. The scene includes a wooden trellis, stone pavilion, and rocky outcrops with distant hills visible under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a moonlit coastal overlook and transitions through the interior of a Greek estate into a quiet garden courtyard. It begins by panning across dark ocean waters toward a distant mountain island before a flaming ceremonial brazier enters the frame to illuminate a stone terrace. As the camera turns away from the sea, it circles the red stone walls of the Erymanthos House, following a torch-bearing NPC along a cobblestone path lined with olive trees. The scene then shifts from the cool night air into the warm, lamp-lit interior of the house, gliding past patterned rugs, wooden screens, and storage vases. Finally, the camera exits the building back into the moonlight, moving through a garden courtyard with stone planters and a wooden trellis toward an armored character standing against a backdrop of distant hills.
